prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CEMENTTRUCK-RC Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Remote Control City Cement Mixing RC Truck Construction Toys with Lights, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Little builders will be ready to construct and develop their own job site with these awesome Remote Control Heavy Duty RC Truck Construction Toys from Kidplokio. Available in three different themes, garbage, dump and cement mixer, kids will love to collect the whole fleet for the ultimate in RC truck playtime action, whether playing solo or racing against friends or family.

Fitted with fast moving wheels and an easy to use remote control, little workers can maneuver the RC truck vehicles through the construction site forwards, backwards, left and right. In addition, the cement mixer rotates in 360 circles, just like a real cement mixing truck, while the dump and garbage truck toys can lift up their container, just like in real life. Lastly, all the RC truck construction toys come with vibrant lights, making playtime even more fun and realistic. Little builders will be ready to mend any city construction emergency they can imagine, creating their own cities, roads, buildings and highways, leading to endless hours of entertainment and creative pretend play.

And, not only will your little contractor in training be thrilled and occupied for hours with these Heavy Duty RC Truck Construction Toys from Kidplokio, kids and toddlers will be developing crucial early educational skills through imaginative playtime sessions, as well as working on their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination too. Search Terms: Remote control cars rc cars birthday present toys for boys brother Hanukkah Christmas gifts playroom holiday toy list 2022 stocking stuffers interactive toys toy garbage dump truck cement mixer Features: - REMOTE CONTROL TRUCKS: City garbage, dump or cement mixing RC truck, kids will love playing with and maneuvering these RC truck construction toys! Available in three different colors, little ones will love to collect the whole fleet for the ultimate in RC truck playtime action! - REMOTE CONTROL TRUCKS: City garbage, dump or cement mixing RC truck, kids will love playing with and maneuvering these RC truck construction toys! Available in three different colors, little ones will love to collect the whole fleet for the ultimate in RC truck playtime action! - PRETEND PLAY: Little builders will be ready to mend any city construction emergency they can imagine with the Remote Control Truck Construction Toys! Their imaginations will soar as they create their own cities, roads, buildings and highways, leading to endless hours of entertainment and creative pretend play - FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only will your little contractor in training be thrilled and occupied for hours with these Heavy Duty RC Truck Construction Toys, kids and toddlers will be developing crucial early educational skills through imaginative playtime sessions, as well as working on their fine motor skills and hand eye coordination - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 22 x 8 x 5.5 inches; Weight: 2.0lbs; Colors: Green, Red or Yellow; Batteries: x5 AAA, Not Included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
